##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Clear to pale violet melted looking blobs or elongated tabular crystals, associated with clear to white hexagonal prismatic penfieldite, blue tabular pseudoboleite, and colorless tabular gypsum.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100178
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
